---
title: "My Journey in STEM"
subtitle: "From Sydney to San Francisco — HPC, Cloud, and Quantum"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
author: Cameron Rutherford
format:
  revealjs:
    output-ext: reveal.html
    theme: night
    smaller: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    menu: true
    chalkboard: false
    slide-level: 3
  html:
    toc: true
revealjs-plugins:
  - confetti
  - seminar
  - quiz
---

### Welcome!

Scan the QR code or visit the link to follow along:

{{< qrcode https://cameronrutherford.quarto.pub/camerons-git-site/presentations/minds-matter/presentation.reveal.html follow-along >}}

## Growing Up

### Australian / American Dual Citizenship

*[Photo placeholder]*

### Basketball

*[Photo placeholder]*

## High School

### Sydney Grammar School

*[Photo placeholder]*

### ATAR & HSC

*[Content placeholder — the stress, the system, the scores]*

## College

### Whitworth University

*[Photo placeholder]*

### Academics & Basketball

*[Content placeholder]*

## Career

### PNNL — National Lab Research

*[Content placeholder — ExaGO, E3SM, supercomputers]*

### AWS — Cloud & Quantum

*[Content placeholder — current role, CQC]*

## What is HPC / Cloud / Quantum?

### High Performance Computing

*[Content placeholder]*

### Pop Quiz: What does HPC stand for? {.quiz-question}

- [High Performance Computing]{.correct}
- Hyper Parallel Clustering
- Hardware Processing Center
- High Power Calculation

### Cloud Computing & AWS

*[Content placeholder]*

### Quantum Computing

*[Content placeholder]*

### {background-iframe="https://wall.sli.do/event/rkxz9zbJRtoR8Z9ggJ3rMa?section=245085f5-655c-4175-adec-962561bdb19e" background-interactive="true"}

<!-- Presenter admin link: https://auth.slido.com/eu1/api/latest/the-auth/user/lifecycle-process/shareable-link/init?token=82d5358fb32f77c8a10b19ca0a7fcf2f7d4372cd379154c6392fcd071b75d4ba -->

## Thank You!

### Questions & Feedback

Join at [sli.do](https://app.sli.do/event/rkxz9zbJRtoR8Z9ggJ3rMa) or scan:

{{< qrcode https://app.sli.do/event/rkxz9zbJRtoR8Z9ggJ3rMa slido >}}
